Investment Thesis

This is the inversion of private equity

Just as KKR revolutionized buyouts with financial engineering in the 1980s, Inversion is doing the same with cryptographic engineering.

01

Acquire Durable Businesses

We identify cash-flow-positive businesses in telecom, financial services, and logistics — sectors with legacy infrastructure, high intermediation costs, and clear readiness for modernization.

02

Embed Cryptographic Rails

We replace slow, opaque settlement layers with programmable payments, verifiable supply chain primitives, and on-chain identity — making each business faster and more transparent.

03

Scale the Platform

Inversion Labs (our technology arm) builds shared infrastructure deployed across every portfolio company. Each acquisition strengthens the platform; each platform capability accelerates the next acquisition.

How We Operate

Dual-entity architecture

Two distinct vehicles working in concert: the technology development arm and the acquisition fund.

⚙

Inversion Labs

Technology development arm. Builds the core blockchain platform — a shared, performant infrastructure layer for programmable payments, identity, and data verification. Bootstrapped by the $26.5M seed. Deployed across every portfolio company.

◈

Inversion Capital

Private equity acquisition vehicle. Sources, diligences, and acquires target operating businesses. Structures each acquisition to integrate the Inversion platform post-close. Separate fund with dedicated LP capital.

⊞

Platform Economics

Each portfolio company runs on the same infrastructure. Network effects compound: more companies on the platform means better data, lower unit costs, and faster deployment for the next acquisition. Margin expansion through technology leverage.

⌘

Governance & Transparency

On-chain fund administration, real-time portfolio reporting, and programmable compliance. LPs see exactly where capital is deployed. This is private equity built for the people who write the checks.

"Our North Star is to make crypto invisible to our users. They won't see how the technology works, but they'll feel the impact. Faster, better, cheaper."

— Santiago Roel Santos, Co-Founder & CEO

Let's build the future of private equity

We're actively evaluating acquisition targets in telecom, financial services, and logistics. If you're a founder looking for an exit or an LP interested in the fund, we'd like to hear from you.
